content.en:
Since the Forbidden Void Realm had not yet been truly stable, the true powerhouses had not yet descended, but some Supreme Dao Ancestors had arrived.

The three great kings of Black Wind Mountain, the Wind King, the Fire King, and the Time King have arrived, the Void Mi Dao Ancestor and the Heaven Swallowing Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect, the Heavenly Weapon Dao Ancestor and the Tianqi Dao Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple, the Shenhai Dao Ancestor and the Eight Cloud Dao Ancestor of the Tianhai Sect......

These Supreme Dao Ancestors descended here as the first batch of powerhouses to probe the situation in the Forbidden Void Realm.

Once the Forbidden Void Realm stabilized, those invincible Dao Ancestors might appear immediately, and even the half-step Domain Ancestors might make a move.

Ye Tian also came here, after all, it was impossible for him not to come when such a big thing happened.

However, what Ye Tian came was to copy his body and arrive as the Nine Extremes Heavenly King.

......

Ye Tian followed the Wind King and the Fire King, staring at an area not far away, where the rules were very chaotic, especially the spatial rules were constantly oscillating, and he could vaguely sense a majestic world.

This world contains powerful taboo rules, and it is clearly not an ordinary world.

"Wind King, Forbidden Void Realm, do we Black Wind Mountain also want to snatch it?"

Ye Tianchuan asked.

"It depends on the situation, but there is a high probability that it will not be snatched, after all, our Black Wind Mountain has a small realm, and the concealment is even greater than the forbidden void realm. However, the cultivation environment of the Forbidden Void Realm far exceeds that of the small realm, and the Forbidden Void Realm has many forbidden treasures, and forbidden strange things will slowly be born in the future. Therefore, in terms of value, a Forbidden Void Realm is also comparable to a small realm! But at present, we have no shortage of small realms in Black Wind Mountain. "

The Wind King recounted.

Black Wind Mountain doesn't care too much about a Forbidden Void Realm, but it doesn't mean that the powerhouses of Forbidden Mountain don't care.

For example, the Wind King, if he really snatched the Forbidden Void Realm, he would definitely be happy!

After all, a forbidden void realm can be used to develop its own power, as its own base camp, and expand its legions.

With the passage of time, after the rule fluctuations of the Forbidden Void Realm reached a peak, it slowly calmed down, and once it was completely calm, it meant that the Forbidden Void Realm had completely stabilized.

About half a month had passed, and the Forbidden Void Realm had completely stabilized.

At this time, the powerhouses of the major forces explored this forbidden void realm one after another.

The Wind King was also exploring this Forbidden Void Realm, crossing the Void through a special secret technique, and a wisp of consciousness descended on the Forbidden Void Realm, and soon learned the general situation of the Forbidden Void Realm.

"It's a small forbidden void realm!"

The Wind King said with some disappointment.

"Small Forbidden Void Realm!"

Ye Tian also knew the division of the Void Forbidden Realm from the classics of Black Wind Mountain, which was divided into small Forbidden Void Realm, medium Forbidden Void Realm, and large Forbidden Void Realm, among which the greatest value was undoubtedly the Large Forbidden Void Realm.

The difference between the small Forbidden Void Realm and the medium and large Forbidden Void Realm is not only the strength of the rules, the size of the world, but also the quantity and quality of the forbidden treasures.

Of course, these are not really gaps.

The rules of the Small Forbidden Void Realm are imperfect and have special restrictions.

For example, the medium-sized taboo void realm and the large forbidden void realm basically have perfect rules, there are almost no restrictions, and the forbidden void realm without restrictions is easier to transform and perfect, while the forbidden void realm with restrictions is somewhat difficult to transform.

Of course, imperfect rules are not without benefits, there must be some taboo Void Realm rules are imperfect, and time passes relatively quickly, this is the benefit!

For example, cultivating in such a forbidden void realm is far faster than the outside world, because time passes quickly inside, which is equivalent to cultivating within the time array.

However, on the whole, the value of a small Forbidden Void Realm is far less than that of a medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm.

As a powerful Dao Ancestor consciously spied into this small forbidden void realm and probed the imperfect rules of this small forbidden void realm, they gradually learned some general information.

Rumble!!!

The Void Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect was proficient in the way of space, and he was about to try to step into the small forbidden void realm when he tore through the void, but he was stuck in the shuttle space, and he couldn't completely step into the forbidden void realm, as if the rules in the underworld excluded him from entering the forbidden void realm.

As a result, the Void Mi Dao Ancestor withdrew.

"The rules of this small forbidden void realm are not perfect, it has the rules to repel the strongest Dao Ancestor, I'm afraid the strongest can only allow the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor! In addition, the time passage inside is about 1,000 times that of the outside world!"

Void Mi Dao Ancestor judged.

"1000 times the passage of time!"

Many forces have been moved, this is a good passage of time!

Although the outside world can also arrange the Time Array, and it can be easily arranged in ten thousand times the time, it also takes resources to arrange the Time Array, and it also takes resources to cultivate in the Time Array.

But if you cultivate in a small forbidden void realm, then you don't need resources, it's the time acceleration that comes with the forbidden void realm itself!

Moreover, the Supreme Dao Ancestor could not enter, which represented an opportunity, and those Seven Heavenly Forces were qualified to compete for this Forbidden Void Realm.

"How about this Forbidden Void Realm give up to our Heavenly Emperor Palace?"

A Dao Ancestor spoke.

This person is the strongest Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace-Xuanhe Dao Ancestor, his strength is much stronger than that of the Blue Sky Dao Ancestor, and he is also a leader at the level of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, not weaker than the Wind King at all.

The Void Mi Dao Ancestor looked at the Xuanhe Dao Ancestor, and said with some displeasure: "How high is the value of the Forbidden Void Realm, the Heavenly Emperor Palace wants to ban the Void Realm, and we want it too, everyone competes fairly, why do you Heavenly Emperor Palace say that we want it, we have to give it?"

The words of the Xumi Dao Ancestor resonated with many people, and they rebuked the Xuanhe Dao Ancestor one after another.

At this time, the Wind King spoke: "I also suggest fair competition, the strongest in this Forbidden Void Realm only allows the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor to enter, then let the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor and the Dao Ancestor whose strength is below the Seventh Heaven enter, who can get how many benefits, who can refine the Forbidden Void Realm, that is whose ability, how?"

Refining the Forbidden Void Realm is very difficult, it takes a long time, and before you completely occupy a Forbidden Void Realm, how can you have time to refine the Forbidden Void Realm!

Therefore, this time, at most, it is to enter the Forbidden Void Realm to harvest some forbidden strange things, and there is no way to do the rest.

Of course, the Wind King's suggestion was also approved by most of the forces, and although the Xuanhe Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace was a little unhappy, he was unable to resist all the forces.

"Okay, I agree!"

Xuanhe Daozu nodded.

Subsequently.

A Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor arrived one after another, and they were all notified that they wanted to enter the Forbidden Void Realm to grab resources, and if it was possible, they would go all out to refine the Forbidden Void Realm and seize this Forbidden Void Realm.

Of course, this is not mandatory, after all, the possibility is not very great.
